concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文在模型部分前明确列出并论证了多条假设，如消费者理性、饮料类别独立、成本与便利性为主要因素等，为模型简化提供依据。

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 在Part I中，当缺乏直接消费数据时，使用线性回归基于人口统计特征（如年龄、收入）预测各饮料的消费量。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Model 2 — Adapting to a Novel Location: 'We used linear regression to estimate beverage consumption based on demographic factors such as population and median income.'

concepts_used.title: 贝叶斯方法
concepts_used.how_used: 在Part II中，使用贝叶斯方法结合先验便利性评分和成本差异，更新消费者选择饮料的后验概率，预测禁售后的消费转移。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Part II — Modeling the Consumption of Fluids After a PET Ban: 'We employed a Bayesian approach to update the probability of choosing each beverage given the ban, incorporating convenience and cost factors.'

concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 在Part III中，将环境、经济、健康三个维度的得分加权求和得到综合影响向量，并计算向量模长作为总体影响指标。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Part III — Modeling the Impacts of PET Water Bottle Ban: 'We expressed the impact of each beverage as a vector with three components (environmental, economic, and health) scaled by the change in consumption.'

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文对模型中的关键参数（如便利性评分、成本弹性）进行了灵敏度分析，通过改变参数值观察总体影响的变化，验证模型稳健性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Strengths and Weaknesses of the Model: 'We performed sensitivity analysis on key parameters such as convenience ratings and cost elasticity to ensure the model's robustness.'

concepts_used.title: 模型对比的可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 使用柱状图对比三个地点（机场、旧金山、康科德）禁售前后的饮料消费变化，直观展示模型结果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Solution — Beverage Volumes Following PET Ban in Concord and San Francisco: 'Figure 3 shows the comparison of beverage consumption before and after the ban across the three locations.'

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分清晰阐述了问题背景、研究动机、模型整体框架和主要结论，符合IMRaD结构。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: INTRODUCTION: 'The idea of banning the sale of single-use plastic water bottles has been met with controversy...'
